name: Nut-Crusted Bananas
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel fully ripe bananas.
2. Cut the bananas in half lengthwise, then crosswise.
3. Dip the banana pieces into a mixture of equal parts honey and lemon juice.
4. Arrange the coated bananas on a plate.
5. Sprinkle with crushed Macadamia nuts or California walnuts.
